name: app-catalog-core
description: Filesystem-based catalog for versioned apps/games. Auto-discovers entries from STORE_ROOT/{apps,games}/{slug}/{assets,versions}/. No DB needed for the catalog itself — just create folders.

envVars.name: STORE_ROOT
envVars.description: Absolute path where the catalog folders live. Default: ./store

postInstall: 1. Set STORE_ROOT in .env.local if you want a custom location
4. To customize the categories (e.g. only 'plugins'), edit TYPES in store.ts and adjust types accordingly
